events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.

events.name: dust_storm
events.description: Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

governance.rationale: Elect a council of 5 for 5 years.

meta_awareness.insight: Luna Tide notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Ember Veg-II notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Storm Mar notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.
A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Repeating pattern in cosmic ray data — statistical fluke or message?
The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.
A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Subsurface water table detected by ground-penetrating radar.
Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.
Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.

**Storm Mar** (air/artisan) — Year 55

The air in me stirs with possibility.

The dust never stops.

*— Storm Mar, artisan*

**Ember Sto** (earth/sentinel) — Year 55

Another year. We are still here.

The dust never stops.

*— Ember Sto, sentinel*

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

The dust never stops.

*— Rust Vega, engineer*
